goal: Complete the v5.0.0 release: sync shared version across all sites and overhaul docs to the orchestrator-first, two-vendor (Claude Code + Codex) narrative with a new visual identity
acceptance_criteria: Every version site reports 5.0.0 (package.json, EXPECTED_CONFIG_VERSION, example config, GitHub Action pin) and check-config passes
All seven gate suites pass (164 offline cases) plus the trigger smoke fixture
README is a v5 landing page: orchestrator layer + token diet headline, honest install matrix, no stale version markers
references/agentic-orchestration.md is re-centered on orchestrator/worker with the advisor demoted to a history note; no GLM/Gemini/Grok in the routing narrative
philosophy.md and engineering-operating-system.md are consolidated into one philosophy.md; no broken inbound links
All internal markdown links and image references resolve; the six empty center-div placeholders are filled or removed
Historical records (critical-review, spec, docs/records, examples/*-eval-*) are unmodified
constraints: Never weaken a gate; never lower a version to make a check pass
Do not modify SKILL.md body, CHANGELOG history, or historical records except one-line banners where specified
Verify every number and command against the actual code, not old docs
assumptions: v5.0.0 was authored in CHANGELOG but never shipped, so completing it (not a false 5.0.1 bump) is the honest path
verification_plan: run all seven eval suites + the trigger smoke
internal markdown link + image-src resolution check across all *.md

independent_review.summary: All eight acceptance criteria pass; claims re-verified not trusted; every eval suite and check-config re-run on a clean checkout (164/164 across 7 suites, check-config ok). No gate logic weakened. The three flagged deviations are honest and reasonable. No blocking findings.

findings.note: A1 — Historical GLM-5.2 citation in the dated Sudoku 07-01 eval row is a factual record of what was tested; erasing it would violate candor. Keep as-is.
A2 — anatomy.py and gate_gaming.py were not regenerated; their sources encode no stale version/count data (the v3.1.0 strings are correct provenance). Not an AC violation.
A3 — Embed this independent-review verdict into agent-record.json before merge so verify-gates clears its two review-pending warnings (this commit).

minimality_decision.reason: Targeted edits to version sites and docs, plus consolidating two philosophy files into one and rewriting one reference doc. No new modules, dependencies, or gates; the only new files are illustrated art assets copied into docs/images/art/.

rejected_lower_rungs.why_insufficient: A false 5.0.1 version bump would reuse the release machinery but is dishonest: 5.0.0 was authored but never shipped, so completing 5.0.0 is correct.
The version drift and stale docs are real defects that block the release; they cannot be skipped.

plan: Sync all version sites to 5.0.0 and confirm check-config green
Copy new art assets, update generators, regenerate media, fill/remove placeholders
Rewrite README as v5 landing page
Mechanical doc fixes + Droid/Pi maintenance banners + stale model ids
ROADMAP v5 section, CONTRIBUTING suite list, CHANGELOG release-completion note
Run all evals + link check; commit slices; open PR

commands_run.evidence: 10/10 trigger smoke cases passed (excluded from the 164 count)

open_risks: Independent review is pending: this record is single-agent dogfooding evidence, not a completed two-vendor review. The routed v5 loop would send this diff to a Codex reviewer before ship.
review_findings: Independent cross-family review (openai/gpt-5.5, fresh context): APPROVE. All 8 ACs pass; 164/164 across 7 suites re-run; check-config ok; no gate logic weakened.
Advisory A1: historical GLM-5.2 eval citation kept (candor); A2: anatomy/gate_gaming images carry no stale data; A3: verdict now embedded in this record.
next_action: Independent review embedded (APPROVE). Merge PR #7 to main with a merge commit; do not squash.
